amdmi3      2009-05-22 22:16:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/avogadro     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Avogadro is an advanced molecular editor designed for cross-platform use in
  computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science,
  and related areas. It offers flexible rendering and a powerful plugin
  architecture.
  
  WWW: http://avogadro.openmolecules.net/
  
  PR:             134710
  Submitted by:   Troels Kofoed Jacobsen <tkjacobsen@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.147     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/science/avogadro/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +342 -0    ports/science/avogadro/pkg-plist (new)
